steps.action: Type 'hello world', press Home, then Shift+Right 5 times
steps.observed: Blue highlight visible on 'hello', cursor at position 5, rest of text ('world') unhighlighted

screenshots: qemu-screen-sel.png (shows 'hello' selected with blue highlight, cursor after 'o')

steps.expected: Visually distinct highlight, readable text within selection
steps.observed: Semi-transparent blue overlay (rgba 50,80,160,180) clearly visible against dark background. Selected text 'hello' remains fully readable through the highlight. Sufficient contrast.

screenshots: qemu-screen-sel.png (blue highlight on 'hello', text readable through it)

steps.action: Type 40 lines ('line1' through 'line40' with Enter between each)
steps.expected: Viewport scrolls down, early lines scroll off top
steps.observed: After typing all lines, viewport shows line7 through line40 + cursor. Lines 1-6 scrolled off screen. Content clipped cleanly at title bar and status bar boundaries.

steps.action: Press left arrow 300 times to navigate cursor back to position 0
steps.expected: Viewport scrolls back up to show first lines
steps.observed: Viewport scrolled back, showing line1 through line35. Cursor at position 0 (start of line1). Content clipped cleanly at both edges.

screenshots: qemu-screen-scroll.png (scrolled down: lines 7-40 visible, cursor at bottom)
qemu-screen-scrollup2.png (scrolled back up: lines 1-35 visible, cursor at top)

steps.observed: Blue cursor bar visible at top-left of content area (boot screenshot)
Cursor bar visible at end of 'hello world' text, status shows '11 chars'
Cursor bar at beginning of line (confirmed by subsequent shift-right selecting from position 0)

steps.action: Navigate through 40 lines with arrow keys
steps.observed: Up arrow moves cursor to previous lines, cursor always visible after scrolling. Left arrow navigates through all 271 chars back to position 0.

steps.action: Select 'hello' (5 chars) via Shift+Right, then type 'X'
steps.expected: Selection replaced with 'X', text becomes 'X world'
steps.observed: Text shows 'X world' (was 'hello world'), status shows '7 chars'. Cursor correctly positioned after 'X'.

steps.action: Press Home, Shift+Right to select 'X', then press Backspace
steps.observed: Text shows ' world', status shows '6 chars'. Cursor at position 0. Entire selection deleted, not just one character.

summary: All 5 interaction assertions pass. Selection via Shift+arrow works correctly, highlight is visible and readable, scrolling works in both directions with clean clipping, cursor is visible and correctly positioned, selection-edit interactions (replace and delete) work as expected.
